title: onagra elata
intro: Onagra elata, also known as Evening Primrose, is a biennial plant native to North America, characterized by its tall spikes of small, fragrant flowers that bloom in the evening. The seeds of this plant contain a rich source of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential omega-6 fatty acid with numerous medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Onagra elata include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects, which contribute to its various health benefits, such as alleviating symptoms of eczema, rheumatoid arthritis, and menopausal hot flashes. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal supplement, oil, or tea, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
